Container.Name: eve-mysql
Container.Overview: MySQL 8.4 database for EVE Data Aggregator. Install this container FIRST, then install eve-data-aggregator. Port 3307 is exposed on the host so you can connect MySQL Workbench or TablePlus to <unraid-ip>:3307 for browsing and migration.
Container.Requires: Install eve-data-aggregator container after this one.

Config.Name: MySQL Root Password
Config.Description: Root password for the MySQL instance. Keep this safe — also used by db/migrate.sh for imports.

Config.Name: App DB User
Config.Description: Database username the application will connect with.

Config.Name: App DB Password
Config.Description: Password for the application database user. Must match DB_PASSWORD in the app container.

Config.Name: Host Port
Config.Description: Host port mapped to MySQL. Use 3307 to avoid conflicts with any existing MySQL on 3306. Connect Workbench to <unraid-ip>:3307.

Config.Name: Data Volume
Config.Description: Named Docker volume for MySQL data. Persists across container removal and image updates. Only deleted by explicit 'docker volume rm eve-mysql-data'.
